title: Implementer Context Payload
description: Cheap implementer context for a bounded changed-path scope.

kind.description: Discriminator for the implementer context payload shape.

target.description: Resolved target repository for the implementation context.

items.description: One entry in the changed paths list.

changed_paths.description: Changed paths used to select proof, ownership, and inspect scope.

items.description: One entry in the inspect files list.

inspect_files.description: Files the implementer should inspect before editing.

items.description: One entry in the files to avoid list.

files_to_avoid.description: Files that should stay untouched for this bounded task.

package_boundary.description: Package/root boundary warnings that affect implementation scope.

items.description: One entry in the path boundaries list.

path_boundaries.description: Path-specific ownership and locality constraints for the changed paths.

items.description: One entry in the authority markers list.

authority_markers.description: Authority markers relevant to the implementation scope.

proof.description: Selected proof lane and validation commands for the changed paths.

items.description: One entry in the required validation commands list.

required_validation_commands.description: Commands that must pass before claiming implementation complete.

status.description: Whether the implementer context is based on changed paths or an unknown scope.

minimum_before_editing.description: Minimum orientation step an agent should complete before implementation.

preflight_command.description: Command for one-call startup, config, and active-state orientation.

summary_command.description: Command for active planning and handoff-state orientation.

trust_note.description: Review-trust consequence when workspace orientation is skipped for planned or high-risk work.

orientation.description: Minimum workspace orientation guidance for the implementer.

rule.description: Boundary for what implement --changed can derive from available workspace state.

items.description: One class of guidance the command can infer.

can_infer.description: Information classes derived from paths, config, active planning, or package metadata.

items.description: One class of guidance the command cannot infer.

cannot_infer.description: Information classes that still require human or agent judgment.

when_uncertain.description: Routing instruction when changed-path context is insufficient.

kind.description: Discriminator for the execution posture payload.

capability_posture.description: Task capability posture inferred from changed paths and optional task text.

runtime_resolution.description: Compact stay-local, stronger-reasoning, external-delegation, or manual-handoff recommendation.

delegation_control.description: Local human-control mode and whether automatic delegation is permitted.

selected_target.description: Suggested local delegation target when one matches the inferred posture.

recommended_action.description: Recommended execution category for the implementer.

quality_tradeoff.description: Why the recommendation preserves or improves implementation quality.

token_tradeoff.description: When token saving is acceptable or should be deferred.

ready_handoff.description: Prompt or handoff packet to use when local mode allows manual or suggested delegation.

items.description: One limit of the inferred execution posture.

inference_limits.description: Limits that prevent the posture recommendation from becoming hidden execution authority.

execution_posture.description: Actionable local execution posture for orchestration before implementation.

items.description: One entry in the before handoff list.

before_handoff.description: Ordered before handoff entries used by this contract.

items.description: One entry in the stop when list.

stop_when.description: Ordered stop when entries used by this contract.

handoff_requirements.description: Information that must be preserved before pausing or handing off work.

next_allowed_action.description: Smallest safe implementation action after reading this context.

task_routing.description: Routing guidance when the task is too broad, misplaced, or needs planning first.

path.description: Path segments or repository path used by this contract.

authority.description: Authority level or owner for this surface.

canonical_source.description: Source of truth for this generated, derived, or adapter surface.

safe_to_edit.description: Whether agents may edit this surface under the declared authority rules.

refresh_command.description: Command used to refresh this generated or managed surface.

authority_marker.description: Authority marker details used by this contract.

status.description: Current lifecycle, readiness, or health state.

cwd.description: Working directory context used when running the command.

warning.description: Warning contract value used by this contract.

package_root.description: Package root text value used by this contract.

package_boundary.description: Package boundary details used by this contract.

path.description: Path segments or repository path used by this contract.

authority.description: Authority level or owner for this surface.

warning.description: Warning contract value used by this contract.

requires_attention.description: Requires attention true/false policy flag used by this contract.

path_boundary.description: Path boundary details used by this contract.
